title: Manager Review (Leave Management)
acceptanceCriteria: Approver can perform "Manager Review" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: fromDate must be before or equal to toDate
requested amount must not exceed remaining balance/eligibility
overlapping leave requests for the same requester are not allowed
attachment required when leave type requires supporting evidence
weekend/holiday exclusion rule applies when calculating requested days/units
approver cannot approve their own request
requests cannot be submitted past the configured cutoff window

workflow.name: Request-Approval Workflow
workflow.stateTransition: Request-Approval Workflow -> Leave Management -> Manager Review

business.reason: Supports the Request-Approval Workflow business pattern for "Leave Management": Manager Review is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: fromDate must be before or equal to toDate
requested amount must not exceed remaining balance/eligibility
overlapping leave requests for the same requester are not allowed
attachment required when leave type requires supporting evidence
weekend/holiday exclusion rule applies when calculating requested days/units
approver cannot approve their own request
requests cannot be submitted past the configured cutoff window
validations: fromDate must be before or equal to toDate
requested amount must not exceed remaining balance/eligibility
overlapping leave requests for the same requester are not allowed
attachment required when leave type requires supporting evidence
weekend/holiday exclusion rule applies when calculating requested days/units
approver cannot approve their own request
requests cannot be submitted past the configured cutoff window
business.stateTransition: Request-Approval Workflow -> Leave Management -> Manager Review
business.acceptanceCriteria: Approver can perform "Manager Review" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Manager Review attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Manager Review attempted by a role without permission
Manager Review attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Manager Review succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Manager Review is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Leave Management is independently exercised against Manager Review.
permissionTests: Manager Review is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Manager Review -> downstream state is consistent with the Request-Approval Workflow pattern.
regressionTests: High - core lifecycle step, breaking this blocks the whole module
performanceTests: Manager Review completes within accepted UX/API thresholds.
coverageRules: REQ-LEAVE-04 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.impact: High release impact; blocks release if incomplete.
release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Leave Management Manager Review changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Manager Review succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Manager Review rejected with invalid data
Access: Manager Review rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
